title: Fix more wide ternary + coverage cases
body:
Follow up to #6152

My previous fix didn't work for `assign` statements because it would leave the intermediate variables outside of any function and then we'd get this from `Localize`:
```
        UASSERT_OBJ(m_cfuncp, nodep, "AstVarRef not under function");
```

Added some more test cases and handled the `assign` scenario.
